description: Creates a point at a fractional position along a line, arc, circle, or ellipse. The ratio ranges from 0 (start) to 1 (end).
utility: Place a point at a ratio along a shape

arguments.name: shape
arguments.description: The shape to place the point on

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Color, size, marker icon, fill-image, or notes

alternates.description: Point at 25% around a circle (0=start, 1=full circumference)

examples.scenario: Point on circle at ratio with styling
examples.expression:
C = circle(G, (0, 0), radius(3))
P = ratiopoint(G, C, 0.25, c(red), s(4))

S = spline(G, point(G, 0, 8), point(G, 1, 6), point(G, 2, 3), point(G, 3, 0))
var_anim = variableanimator(at(5,29), "t", 0, 1)
P = ratiopoint(G, S, t)
play_1 = playanimator(var_anim)
